description: Style NoteGet your boy up and about in a pair of shorts from gini and jony that play as hard as he does. Team this with a tee and comfy footwear when you take him out. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.Product DetailsBeige shorts made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets and two cargo buttoned flap pockets on the front, two buttoned flap pockets on the back with printed branding on the right pocket, has a comfortable waistband with elastic at the back, comes with a detachable canvas belt and has a push clasp and zipper on the front Material and care100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery
